title: vitis-idaea punctata var. minor
intro: Vitis-idaea punctata var. minor, also known as dwarf cranberry, is a low-growing, evergreen perennial plant that belongs to the heath family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitis-idaea punctata var. minor include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues, as well as supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance its effects.
